prompt: Create a photorealistic 3:4 full-body portrait of an exceptionally beautiful adult East Asian woman in her mid-20s, standing in a quiet modern hallway with warm beige walls, a simple wooden handrail and soft ceiling lights. She has a cute, highly refined Japanese-Korean appearance: a softly rounded oval face, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes, subtle eyeliner, rosy cheeks, a small delicate nose and glossy pink lips. Her expression is sweet, playful and slightly shy, with a gentle closed-mouth smile. She has a short chestnut-brown bob haircut ending at the jaw, wispy straight bangs and two longer strands framing her cheeks. She has a very curvy hourglass figure with a full bust, narrow waist, wide rounded hips and thick shapely thighs, while keeping realistic adult anatomy. She wears a fitted white ribbed halter-neck mini dress with a high gathered neckline, sleeveless shoulders and opaque stretch fabric that naturally follows her silhouette. Add a delicate silver bracelet and pale manicured nails. Recreate the pose precisely: she stands facing the camera with her hips shifted strongly to one side, knees close together and upper body slightly tilted. One arm crosses horizontally over her waist, supporting the opposite elbow. The raised hand points one index finger gently against her cheek. She looks directly into the camera with a soft, cute smile. Casual indoor smartphone photography, slightly low front-facing camera angle, full body visible from head to mid-thigh, natural skin texture, warm diffused lighting, mild phone-camera softness, realistic fabric folds and body proportions. No anime, no CGI, no plastic skin, no distorted hands, no extra fingers, no text, logo or watermark.

She has a cute, highly refined Japanese-Korean appearance: a softly rounded oval face, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes, subtle eyeliner, rosy cheeks, a small delicate nose and glossy pink lips. She has a short chestnut-brown bob haircut ending at the jaw, wispy straight bangs and two longer strands framing her cheeks. promptZh: 创作一张 3:4 的写实全身肖像，主角是一位极其美丽的成年 东亚 女性，年龄 20 多岁，站在安静的现代走廊中，背景是温暖的米色墙壁、简约的木质扶手和柔和的吸顶灯。她拥有精致可爱的日韩系长相：柔和的椭圆形脸庞、深褐色的大杏眼、淡雅的眼线、红润的双颊、小巧精致的鼻子和水润的粉色嘴唇。她的表情甜美、俏皮且略带羞涩，嘴角挂着温柔的微笑。她留着 栗棕色短波波头，发尾齐颌，带有轻薄的直刘海，两侧有两缕长发修饰脸型。她拥有非常迷人的沙漏型身材，胸部丰满、腰肢纤细、臀部圆润宽阔、大腿丰满匀称，同时保持真实的成年女性生理结构。她穿着一件修身的 白色罗纹挂脖迷你裙，高领口设计，无袖，不透明的弹力面料自然贴合她的身形。佩戴一只精致的银色手镯，指甲修剪整齐并涂有淡色指甲油。请精确还原以下姿势：她正对镜头站立，臀部大幅度向一侧偏移，双膝并拢，上半身微微倾斜。一只手臂横跨腰间，支撑着另一侧的手肘。抬起的手指轻轻点在脸颊上。她直视镜头，带着温柔可爱的微笑。休闲室内智能手机摄影风格，略微低角度的正面拍摄，全身可见（从头部到大腿中部），自然的皮肤纹理，温暖的漫射光，带有手机拍摄特有的轻微柔焦感，真实的布料褶皱和身体比例。拒绝动漫风格，拒绝 CGI，拒绝塑料感皮肤，拒绝手部畸形，拒绝多余手指，无文字、无 Logo、无水印。
